name: Links of Laramie
address: 725 E Skyline Dr Suite G, Laramie, WY 82070
about: Links of Laramie is an indoor golf facility equipped with two Full Swing E6 Golf Simulators. The venue offers golfers the ability to play on over 100 courses and utilize extensive practice features, including a driving range, chipping areas, and a dedicated putting green. It operates on an appointment-only basis with a 24-hour advance reservation requirement. Pricing is structured on an hourly basis, with options for single sessions, 10-visit passes, and a seasonal membership program valid from November through May.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to 100+ courses for year-round indoor play
Comprehensive practice facilities including driving range, chipping, and putting green
Flexible booking options with hourly, pass, and membership packages
Suitable for up to 4 players, ideal for small groups and corporate outings

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food service
No mention of alcohol service or BYOB policy

simulator_hardware.notes: Two simulator bays equipped with Full Swing E6 systems

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The content does not specify, but it is standard practice at simulator venues to use your own clubs. Club rentals are listed as an available amenity.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service or a policy regarding outside food and drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide a specific time estimate for playing 18 holes. A typical round on a simulator can take 2-3 hours depending on the number of players.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website does not specifically mention being kid-friendly, but it does highlight features that could appeal to families, such as being great for small corporate outings and offering practice facilities.
